g.title: MLPFamilyConditioning
g.text: Code-aligned MLP family conditioning (controlled QC-gated post-training)

g.title: fh_init
g.text: duplicate pooled mean into both heads

g.title: fh_note
g.text: Eval fallback is only for a configured
but untrained family: route to f = 1.
A genuinely new id needs model expansion.

g.title: rfh_note
g.text: New family requires a new Delta head.

g.title: film_note
g.text: New family requires a gamma/beta row
and a Delta head. Identity + zero init
